requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — UzStandard Certificate of Conformity for 220 V/50 Hz Type C/F Grid
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V/50Hz C/F型电网UzStandard合格证书
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V/50Hz C/F型電網UzStandard合格證書

summary.en: Wireless devices with power supply units or mains connection sold in Uzbekistan must comply with electrical safety requirements under O'z DSt standards aligned with IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety) or IEC 60950-1 as applicable, and obtain a UzStandard Certificate of Conformity (Sertifikat Sootvetstviya) covering electrical safety. Uzbekistan operates a 220–230 V / 50 Hz electrical grid using Type C (Europlug, 2-pin) and Type F (Schuko, 2-pin with earth) sockets. Power supplies designed for 110 V (North American standard) require voltage conversion and are not suitable for direct connection. Chinese 220 V power supplies with Type A or Type I plugs require physical plug adaptation for Type C/F sockets. The UzStandard electrical safety certificate is issued by an accredited Uzbek certification body following testing at an accredited laboratory. CCC electrical safety approval (GB 4943.1) is not recognised.
summary.zh: 在乌兹别克斯坦销售的带电源单元或主电源连接的无线设备，须符合O'z DSt标准（对齐IEC 62368-1《音频、视频及信通技术设备安全》或适用的IEC 60950-1）下的电气安全要求，并取得涵盖电气安全的UzStandard合格证书（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）。乌兹别克斯坦电网为220-230V / 50Hz，使用C型（欧标，双圆针）和F型（德式接地，双圆针带接地）插座。为110V（北美标准）设计的电源需进行电压转换，不适合直接连接。带A型或I型插头的中国220V电源需通过物理转换适配C/F型插座。UzStandard电气安全证书由认可的乌兹别克认证机构在认可实验室检测后颁发，CCC电气安全核准（GB 4943.1）不被认可。
summary.zht: 在烏茲別克銷售的帶電源單元或主電源連接的無線設備，須符合O'z DSt標準（對齊IEC 62368-1《音頻、視頻及資通技術設備安全》或適用的IEC 60950-1）下的電氣安全要求，並取得涵蓋電氣安全的UzStandard合格證書（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）。烏茲別克電網為220-230V / 50Hz，使用C型（歐標，雙圓針）和F型（德式接地，雙圓針帶接地）插座。為110V（北美標準）設計的電源需進行電壓轉換，不適合直接連接。帶A型或I型插頭的中國220V電源需通過物理轉換適配C/F型插座。UzStandard電氣安全證書由認可的烏茲別克認證機構在認可實驗室檢測後頒發，CCC電氣安全核准（GB 4943.1）不被認可。

standards_or_laws: O'z DSt standards series — Uzbek state standards for electrical safety of information and communications technology equipment, aligned with IEC 62368-1 and IEC 60950-1
IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements (as adopted/referenced in O'z DSt)
UzStandard / Gosstandart — Agency for Technical Regulation, Standardization and Metrology — issues Certificates of Conformity for electrical safety in Uzbekistan
Uzbekistan grid standard — 220–230 V / 50 Hz; Type C (CEE 7/16) and Type F (CEE 7/4 Schuko) sockets

summary.en: Chinese wireless and IoT devices with power supplies must obtain CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for electrical safety, tested to applicable GB standards (GB 4943.1, which adopts IEC 60950-1, or GB/T 37965 / IEC 62368-1). China operates a 220 V / 50 Hz grid but uses Type A (flat 2-pin) and Type I (flat 3-pin, Australian-style) sockets, which are different from Uzbekistan's Type C/F. Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates are not recognised by UzStandard. A new UzStandard Certificate of Conformity must be obtained. Plug adapters are required for Chinese Type A or Type I-plugged products to fit Uzbekistan's Type C/F sockets.
summary.zh: 带电源的中国无线及物联网设备须取得电气安全CCC（中国强制认证），依据适用GB标准检测（GB 4943.1采纳IEC 60950-1，或GB/T 37965 / IEC 62368-1）。中国电网为220V / 50Hz，但使用A型（扁双针）和I型（澳式扁三针）插座，与乌兹别克斯坦的C/F型插座不同。中国CCC电气安全证书不被UzStandard承认；须取得新的UzStandard合格证书。带A型或I型插头的中国产品须使用插头转换器以适配乌兹别克斯坦的C/F型插座。
summary.zht: 帶電源的中國無線及物聯網設備須取得電氣安全CCC（中國強制認證），依據適用GB標準檢測（GB 4943.1採納IEC 60950-1，或GB/T 37965 / IEC 62368-1）。中國電網為220V / 50Hz，但使用A型（扁雙針）和I型（澳式扁三針）插座，與烏茲別克的C/F型插座不同。中國CCC電氣安全證書不被UzStandard承認；須取得新的UzStandard合格證書。帶A型或I型插頭的中國產品須使用插頭轉換器以適配烏茲別克的C/F型插座。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment (adopts IEC 60950-1), mandatory for CCC in China
GB/T 37965 — Safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment (aligned with IEC 62368-1)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification — mandatory electrical safety certification for IT and consumer electronics sold in China
China grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Type A (flat 2-pin) and Type I (flat 3-pin) sockets

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certifications are not recognised by UzStandard; a separate UzStandard Certificate of Conformity is required. The underlying IEC 62368-1 standard is shared, but re-testing at a UzStandard-accredited laboratory is needed. Chinese products with Type A or Type I plugs require physical plug adaptation to Type C or Type F for the Uzbekistan market — a product modification to plan before finalising the Uzbek market version. Voltage compatibility (220 V) matches between China and Uzbekistan; however, all power-sensitive components must be verified for 50 Hz compatibility.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证不被UzStandard承认；须另行取得UzStandard电气安全合格证书。底层IEC 62368-1标准相同，但仍需在UzStandard认可实验室重新测试。带A型或I型插头的中国产品在乌兹别克斯坦市场须物理改装为C/F型插头——这是一项须在确定乌兹别克斯坦市场版本前规划的产品改动。电压兼容性（220V）中乌一致；但所有对频率敏感的元件须核实50Hz兼容性。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證不被UzStandard承認；須另行取得UzStandard電氣安全合格證書。底層IEC 62368-1標準相同，但仍需在UzStandard認可實驗室重新測試。帶A型或I型插頭的中國產品在烏茲別克市場須物理改裝為C/F型插頭——這是一項須在確定烏茲別克市場版本前規劃的產品改動。電壓相容性（220V）中烏一致；但所有對頻率敏感的元件須核實50Hz相容性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UzStandard Certificate of Conformity covering electrical safety required for mains-powered wireless devices sold in Uzbekistan; Type C/F plug required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification covering electrical safety required for mains-powered devices sold in China

source.publisher: UzStandard / Gosstandart — Agency for Technical Regulation, Standardization and Metrology of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A UzStandard Certificate of Conformity for electrical safety is mandatory for mains-powered wireless devices sold in Uzbekistan. Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates are not accepted. Re-testing at a UzStandard-accredited laboratory is required. Plug adaptation from Chinese Type A/I to Type C/F (Uzbekistan standard) is required as a product modification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UzStandard电气安全合格证书是乌兹别克斯坦销售主电源供电无线设备的强制要求。中国CCC电气安全证书不被接受。须在UzStandard认可实验室重新测试。中国A/I型插头需作为产品改动适配C/F型（乌兹别克斯坦标准）插头。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UzStandard電氣安全合格證書是烏茲別克銷售主電源供電無線設備的強制要求。中國CCC電氣安全證書不被接受。須在UzStandard認可實驗室重新測試。中國A/I型插頭需作為產品改動適配C/F型（烏茲別克標準）插頭。
